welcome.heroSubtitle: Join the trusted place where doctors find life partners. Verified, safe, and private.
welcome.verifiedProfilesDesc: We check your ID and medical papers.
welcome.welcomeBackSubtitle: Welcome back! Please enter your details.

welcome.passwordResetSuccess: Password reset successfully! Please login with your new password.
welcome.twoFactorDesc: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

modal.customizeSecurity: We set up safety based on who you are.
modal.candidateDesc: I am looking for a life partner
modal.parentGuardianDesc: I am managing a profile for my child
modal.privacyNote: Your details are kept private. We never share on social media.
modal.phoneHint: If this number is registered, we'll send a code via SMS.
modal.emailHint: We'll send a login code to this email.
modal.magicLinkSent: We sent a login link to {{identifier}}.
modal.unusualActivity: We noticed something unusual. Please confirm it's you.

onboarding.title: Complete Profile
onboarding.careerSubtitle: This helps us find the right match for you
onboarding.aboutMeSubtitle: A short intro helps your profile get noticed
onboarding.introPlaceholder: Write a brief introduction about yourself...
onboarding.photoSubtitle: Profiles with photos get 10× more proposals
onboarding.photoHint: Upload a clear, recent photo of yourself. Supported formats: JPG, PNG. Max size: 5 MB.
onboarding.saveFailed: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

sidebar.keepUpdated: Keep your basics, photos, and career sections updated to boost visibility.
sidebar.tipContent: Profiles with a complete "Hobbies" section get 40% more proposals. Add yours today!

discovery.searchPlaceholder: Search by specialty, name, ID or keyword...

messages.title: Messages
messages.encrypted: Your messages are private and secure
messages.selectConversation: Select a conversation from the sidebar to start chatting with your matches.
messages.scheduleCallDesc: Send a message to request a convenient time to talk.
messages.icebreaker1: Assalaamu Alaikum! I noticed your profile and was really impressed. I'd love to know more about you.
messages.icebreaker2: Hi! Your profile caught my attention. Do you mind if we start a conversation?
messages.icebreaker3: Hello! I appreciate your profile details. Shall we discuss our expectations?
messages.icebreaker4: Salam! I think we share similar values. Would you be interested in connecting?
messages.icebreaker5: Hi there! I'd love to learn more about your interests and what you're looking for.
messages.premiumOnlyBody: Messaging is for premium users only. Please subscribe to a premium package to unlock this feature.
messages.premiumBenefit1Body: Open approved proposal chats instantly and continue the discussion inside your panel.
messages.premiumBenefit2Body: Invite qualified members through your referral code and unlock premium rewards when thresholds are met.
messages.premiumBenefit3Title: Buy a package for immediate access
messages.premiumBenefit3Body: Choose a premium package now if you want messaging and other paid features right away.
messages.upgradeChoiceTitle: Choose how you want to unlock messaging
messages.upgradeChoiceBody: Pick the upgrade path that suits you best. Referral rewards help you earn premium access, while package purchase gives immediate activation.
messages.referralOptionBody: Open your referral dashboard, copy your code or link, and work toward the premium reward through successful qualified referrals.
messages.packageOptionBody: View membership plans and choose the package that activates messaging and other premium benefits immediately.
messages.subscriptionRequiredToast: Messaging is available for premium users only.

profile.detailsAfterMutualInterest: Full profile will be shown after both sides agree.
profile.unlockFullProfile: Accept the request to see full profile.
profile.partnerExpectations: What They Want in a Partner
profile.failedToLoadCompatibility: Could not check match. Please try again.
profile.headToDiscover: Go to Explore to find your perfect match.
profile.profileDetailsAfterInterest: Full profile will show after both sides agree.
profile.whenSomeoneSendsInterest: When someone sends you a proposal, it will show here.

edit.title: My Profile
edit.subtitle: Edit your profile, privacy settings, and what you want in a partner.
edit.duplicateDesc: We check photos and bio text against our database.
edit.aboutMePlaceholder: Write a brief introduction about yourself...
edit.hobbyHint: Type and press enter to add a hobby.
edit.interestHint: Type and press enter to add an interest.
edit.smartMatchingDesc: Mark things as "Must Have" to remove profiles that don't match. "Nice to Have" helps rank matches better.
edit.idealPartner: Describe your ideal partner in your own words
edit.idealPartnerPlaceholder: Share what qualities, values, and traits matter most to you in a life partner...
edit.privateVaultDesc: Private photos appear blurred to other users.
edit.watermarksActive: Your photos are protected from screenshots.
edit.confirmDeleteImage: Are you sure you want to delete this image?
edit.confirmDeleteVoice: Are you sure you want to delete your voice introduction?
edit.microphoneError: Could not use your microphone. Please allow microphone access and try again.

security.trustedContactDesc: Trusted contacts can help you get back in if you lose access to your phone or email.
security.emailAlertNewDevice: Email me when someone logs in from a new device
security.smsAlertUnknown: Email me if someone logs in from an unknown place
security.transferOwnershipDesc: Give control to a family member or take it back
security.twoFactorDesc: Add extra safety to your account using an app or email code.
security.dualControlDesc: You and a family member manage the profile together.
security.familyManagedDesc: A family member manages this profile on your behalf.
security.matchmakerDesc: A professional matchmaker manages this profile.
security.selfManagedDesc: You manage your own profile by yourself.

billing.enableGateway: Enable a gateway to accept payments.
billing.redeemOffers: Enter a special code or coupon here.
billing.failedApplyCode: Failed to apply code. Please try again.
billing.invalidCode: Invalid code. Please check and try again.

privacy.profileStatusDesc: Turn off to hide your profile from search.
privacy.deactivateDesc: Your profile will be hidden for now.
privacy.deleteDesc: This will remove all your data forever.

safety.verificationDesc: Upload your CNIC or Passport to prove who you are. Verified profiles get 3x more matches.
safety.safeMarriageTipsDesc: Learn how to stay safe when meeting someone new.
safety.reportIncidentDesc: Tell us if something happened. We will act right away.
safety.ghostingPolicyDesc: Please say goodbye politely. See our rules.
safety.dataProtectionDesc: Learn how we keep your personal and family data safe.
safety.completeSecuritySteps: Complete all safety steps to reach 100/100.
safety.noReports: No reports or tickets filed. Clean record!
safety.subject: Subject
safety.verificationStatusDesc: Verified family members make your profile 40% more trusted. We check via LinkedIn or CNIC.
safety.dataBody1: All your data is fully protected and kept safe.
safety.dataBody2: We never share your data with anyone without your permission.
safety.ghostingBody1: Please be polite and say goodbye when ending a conversation.
safety.ghostingBody2: Ignoring people without reply may lower your trust score.
safety.tip1: Always check who the person is before meeting them.
safety.tip2: Meet in public places for the first few meetings.
safety.tip3: Inform a trusted family member or friend about your meeting plans.
safety.tip4: If something feels wrong, leave right away.

family.title: Family Portal
family.subtitle: Manage your family details, guardians, and approvals.
family.familyPhotosDesc: Upload 3-5 photos of parents/siblings. Helps build trust.
family.guardianControlDesc: Choose who can manage this profile.
family.noGuardiansDesc: Add family members who can view and help with finding a match.
family.name: Name
family.matchApprovalDesc: Profiles you or the matchmaker liked, waiting for family review.
family.biodataBuilderDesc: Create a biodata PDF to share with others.
family.modernProfessionalDesc: Simple design with career and education details.
family.biodataDownloadFailed: Failed to download biodata. Please try again.
family.biodataPreviewHint: Professional biodata with your profile details

community.createdSuccessDesc: It will be visible after admin approval.
community.createModalSubtitle: Start a new group for people like you
community.adminApprovalDesc: Our team will check your group before it shows to others.

proposal.notePlaceholder: Write a personal message or select a template below...
proposal.template1: Assalaamu Alaikum! I have reviewed your profile with interest...
proposal.template2: Hi! I believe our families share similar values...
proposal.template3: Salam! After reviewing your profile, I feel we could be a great match...
proposal.alreadySentDesc: You have already sent a proposal to {{name}}. Please wait for their response.
proposal.proposalAcceptedDesc: Great news! {{name}} has accepted your proposal. You can now start a conversation.
proposal.receivedProposalDesc: {{name}} has already sent you a proposal. Check your proposals to respond.

decline.title: Decline Proposal
decline.description: Your decline is private. We will send a polite message. You can also give a reason (only visible to us).
decline.defaultMessage: Thank you for your proposal. Your profile is very good, but I don't think we are the right match right now. I wish you all the best.

verification.confirmDetails: Please confirm or provide your basic details.
verification.noAdditionalDetails: No additional details required for this step.
verification.uploadDocsDesc: Upload clear photos or scans of your documents.
verification.noUploadsNeeded: Your current verification level doesn't need file uploads.
verification.doubleCheck: Double check your information before sending.
verification.submittedDesc: Your documents have been sent safely. Our team will check them soon.

report.title: Report {{name}}
report.whyReporting: Why are you reporting this user?
report.fakeProfileDesc: Using false photos or asking for money.
report.harassmentDesc: Bad language, threats, or wrong messages.
report.inappropriateDesc: Bad photos, violence, or offensive profile.
report.detailsPlaceholder: Please tell us what happened. Include dates and messages if you can.
report.blockDesc: They won't be able to see you or message you.
report.anonymous: This report is anonymous. {{name}} will not know who reported them.

twoFactor.codeSentToContact: We sent a code to your {{method}}.
twoFactor.regenerateDesc: Enter your current code to get new backup codes.
twoFactor.backupCodesDesc: If you lose your phone, these codes are the only way to get back into your account. Keep them safe!
twoFactor.savedConfirm: I have saved these codes in a secure place.
twoFactor.enabledDesc: Your account is now extra safe. You will need to enter a code when you sign in.

referral.title: Referral Program
referral.subtitle: Invite friends and earn exclusive rewards
referral.shareCodeDesc: Share this code with friends to earn rewards
referral.shareText: Join Doctor Marriage Bureau using my referral link!
referral.remainingForReward: {{count}} more referrals needed for next reward
referral.step1Desc: Share your unique referral code or link with friends and family
referral.step2Desc: When they register using your code, they become your referral
referral.step3Desc: Once they complete their profile, you both earn exclusive rewards
referral.noReferralsDesc: Share your code to start earning rewards
referral.noRewardsDesc: Keep referring to unlock your first reward!

referralPopup.defaultBody: Invite your friends to Doctor Marriage Bureau and earn {{days}} days of FREE premium membership when {{count}} of your referrals sign up!
referralPopup.step1Desc: Share your unique referral code or link with friends and family
referralPopup.step2Desc: When they register using your code, they become your referral
referralPopup.step3Desc: Once enough friends join, you both earn premium membership days
